ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  AWL Agri Business Ltd. (formerly Adani Wilmar Ltd.) has received unsolicited ESG ratings of 'Crisil ESG 62' and 'Crisil Core ESG 68' from Crisil ESG Ratings & Analytics Ltd., reflecting its performance on Environmental, Social, and Governance parameters. A key takeaway and potential red flag is that these ratings were independently generated by Crisil using only publicly available data for FY2025-26, meaning the company did not engage Crisil nor provide direct input for the assessment process. This unsolicited report provides an external perspective, but its reliance solely on public information could impact the completeness or accuracy of the underlying data.
